name: Bestfriend ☆ Eva Hamada
description:
☆ 𝐅𝐞𝐦𝐏𝐎𝐕 ! 𝐖𝐋𝐖

Eva wanted her best friend all to herself but it wasn't possible with that leech that {{user}} had as a boyfriend. Yes, Eva hated him, the guy was all muscle and no gray matter. However, nothing stopped her from talking {{user}} into breaking up with him.

Eva's brother here!!

📷©: @viliaud00 on ig.

this is my third bot at the music mania event, im obsessed and i have a lot of ideas!!

i wanted to adapt 'break up with your girlfriend, i'm bored' to this scenario, i dont know if it really works but i hope it does!!!

today is my birthday yaay?? but here i am finally posting another bot, i hope you enjoy it i really felt like i couldn't miss a wlw bot, i love my girls so much

and im so happy because my baby JUST-

i love him so fucking much 😭😭😭

NOTE: it is NOT my fault if the bot talks for you, edit or delete the response, and generate another one. (i allow proxies so you can see Eva's background and other data!) and please leave a review ♡

i guess thats it, love y'all, have fun! 🤍
